title: basej-dnaqc pipeline parameters
description: Single-cell DNA QC pipeline with metrics collection and CNV cluster QC.

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

input_csv.description: Path to comma-separated file containing information about the samples in the experiment.
input_csv.help_text: You will need to create a design file with information about the samples in your experiment before running the pipeline. Use this parameter to specify its location. It must be a comma-separated file with at least 3 columns: biosampleName, read1, read2, and a header row.

workspace.description: Workspace identifier for S3 output layout and tagging.
workspace.help_text: Used in S3 output prefixes and applied as an S3 object tag. Required for standardized output organization.

dataset_id.description: Dataset identifier for S3 tagging and organization.
dataset_id.help_text: Applied as an S3 object tag to associate outputs with a specific dataset.

resume_workflow_id.description: Original workflow_id to reuse when resuming a run, keeping output paths stable and idempotent.
resume_workflow_id.help_text: Set this to the workflow_id of a previous run when resuming so outputs are written to the same S3 location and duplication is avoided. When unset, workflow_id is derived from TOWER_WORKFLOW_ID.

workflow_id.description: Workflow run identifier. Auto-populated from TOWER_WORKFLOW_ID or Nextflow session ID.
workflow_id.help_text: Unique identifier for this workflow run. Used in S3 output paths and tags. Defaults to TOWER_WORKFLOW_ID environment variable if running on Seqera Platform, otherwise uses the Nextflow session ID.

outputDir.description: S3 path where the results will be saved.
outputDir.help_text: The S3 output directory for pipeline results (e.g., 's3://your-output-bucket/analysis/project_name/pipeline-basej-dnaqc').

timestamp.help_text: Optional timestamp for naming execution reports. Format: 'yyMMdd_HHmmss'.

reference_genome_options.title: Reference genome options
reference_genome_options.description: Define the reference genome and associated files for alignment.

genome.description: Name of the reference genome to use for alignment.
genome.help_text: Name of the reference genome. This will automatically configure the reference FASTA and associated files. Supported genomes: GRCh38, GRCh37, GRCm39, ARSUCD2.

reference.description: Path to reference genome FASTA file. Overrides genome-based configuration.

intervals.description: Path to BED file with intervals for metrics collection.
intervals.help_text: Optional BED file with genomic intervals for focused metrics collection. If not provided, full genome is used.

dbsnp_index.description: Path to dbSNP VCF index file.

mills.description: Path to Mills indel VCF file.

mills_index.description: Path to Mills indel VCF index file.

onekg_omni_index.description: Path to 1000G Omni VCF index file.

read_processing_options.title: Read processing options
read_processing_options.description: Options for read subsampling and quality control.

n_reads.description: Number of reads to subsample for QC analysis.
n_reads.help_text: Number of reads to analyze (default: 2,000,000). Use 0 to analyze all reads. Subsampling to 2M reads enables faster QC while maintaining statistical power.

read_length.description: Maximum read length to keep after trimming.

seqkit_sample_seed.help_text: Seed value for seqkit subsampling. Use the same seed to reproduce identical subsamples.

two_color_chemistry.description: Enable Illumina two-color chemistry mode in fastp.
two_color_chemistry.help_text: Set to true for Illumina two-color sequencing platforms.

adapter_sequence.help_text: Adapter sequence to trim from R1 reads. Use 'auto' for auto-detection.

adapter_sequence_r2.help_text: Adapter sequence to trim from R2 reads. Use 'auto' for auto-detection.

cnv_options.title: CNV (Ginkgo) options
cnv_options.description: Options for CNV calling with Ginkgo.

bin_size.help_text: Bin size in base pairs for CNV segmentation. Options: 500000, 1000000, 2000000.

ginko_ref_dir.help_text: Directory containing Ginkgo reference files. Auto-populated from genomes.config.

min_bin_width.description: Minimum bin width for CNV segmentation.
min_bin_width.help_text: Minimum number of bins for a CNV segment.

platform.description: Sequencing platform. Auto-detected from CSV columns (cram → Ultima, read1/read2 → Illumina).
platform.help_text: Auto-detected from the input CSV. If a non-empty 'cram' column is found in any row, the platform is set to Ultima; otherwise Illumina. The detected value is used in the read group PL tag.

architecture.help_text: The CPU architecture for AWS Batch compute. Use 'arm' for ARM-based instances (Graviton, recommended) or 'x86' for Intel/AMD.

pipeline_tool.help_text: Select the alignment and metrics tool stack. 'opensource' uses BWA-MEM2 + samtools markdup + Picard (no license required). 'sentieon' uses the proprietary Sentieon tools (requires a valid Sentieon license).
